scripts.start: concurrently "npm run server" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.mobile: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && node server/index.js
scripts.desktop: concurrently "cd client && npm run dev" "sleep 2 && electron ."
scripts.all: cd client && npm run build && cd .. && concurrently "node server/index.js" "sleep 2 && electron ." "node server/bot.js"
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
